Description: 1-2 sentences about what company does + revenue model
Key_Data_Points: Company name, sector, founding year, locations, key differentiator

Description: 3 bullets: competitive moat + current story + forward opportunity
Key_Data_Points: Thesis 1: Why defensible, Thesis 2: Why now (recent event/metric), Thesis 3: Why ahead (catalysts)

Description: 6 headline numbers with YoY change (Revenue EBITDA PAT H1 coverage gearing)
Key_Data_Points: Each stat: value in 13px bold, label in 8.5px, YoY/direction in green/red

Description: Grouped bar chart FY22-FY25 (Revenue EBITDA PAT) with table beside
Key_Data_Points: Years, revenue values, EBITDA, PAT with margin %; FY25 highlighted

Description: Line chart EBITDA margin % and PAT margin % FY22-FY25 + metrics table
Key_Data_Points: EBITDA line green, PAT line orange, table with interest cover/gearing/TD GCA/op cycle

Description: Donut chart pie split (N.America Europe Asia India) + export %
Key_Data_Points: Percentages by region, total export % highlighted

Description: Donut chart product mix (if pharma: ephedrine/lisdexamfetamine/chiral/specialty)
Key_Data_Points: Product names, percentages, which are high-margin (green)

Description: Donut chart (promoter % vs institutional %), table with promoter names + historical trend
Key_Data_Points: Current split, individual names, FY history showing transition from 100% to new ratio

Description: Bullet list organized by category (core APIs / chiral / specialty)
Key_Data_Points: Product names, key use cases, regulatory status (pills)

Description: Text + bullet list (Mahad capacity + fermenters + Dahej capex + funding)
Key_Data_Points: Location, MTPA capacity, fermenter count/sizes, regulatory approvals with green pills

Description: Table (Facility / Regulator / Status / Warning Letter / Import Alert)
Key_Data_Points: Mahad row highlighted, all-green checkmarks for clean facilities

Description: Table (Parameter / Status / Strategic Significance) with sector-specific metrics
Key_Data_Points: DMF filings, NDPS licenses, backward integration, biotech platforms etc.

Description: Bullet list (R&D spend %
Key_Data_Points: pipeline signals
column8: New product names, pipeline programs, government grants, trade show participation

Description: Bar chart operating cycle trend (FY22-FY25) with CARE trigger line + metrics table
Key_Data_Points: Days on Y-axis, CARE 80-day trigger shown as orange dashed line, metrics: debtor/inventory days

Description: Text + bullet list (B2B vs B2C, customer concentration top 5 %, sales model)
Key_Data_Points: Distribution channel, customer stickiness factors, top customer names where possible

Description: 2x2 grid (Strengths green / Weaknesses red / Opportunities blue / Threats amber)
Key_Data_Points: Each quadrant: 4 bullets, data-backed (no fluff)

Description: Table (Market / Region / Size / CAGR)
Key_Data_Points: TAM in $ or ₹, growth rate, 5-6 relevant markets per company

Description: Timeline of 5 most recent news items (date headline source)
Key_Data_Points: Date in 8.5px, headline in bold, source in gray 8.5px

Description: Vertical list (founded date HQ CIN plant locations type employees website)
Key_Data_Points: Labels in #5A6878, values in #1A2332, use pills for status tags (unlisted PE-backed)

Description: Simple list (type promoter% institutional% pledge% paid-up auth capital)
Key_Data_Points: Show structure: promoter vs institutional, pledge 0% is green pill

Description: Timeline of funding/M&A (date description amount)
Key_Data_Points: Most recent first, use pill tags for transaction type (funding/acquisition)

Description: 3-5 key execs (name title one-line background)
HTML_Class: mgmt boxes with .mn name and .mb bio
Key_Data_Points: Names, titles, 15-20 word bio max

Description: Simple list of 5-7 board members (name role)
Key_Data_Points: Names and roles only, no backgrounds needed

Description: Rating boxes + 4-year history table (date rating outlook)
Key_Data_Points: Current rating prominent (14px bold), small history table below

Description: Checklist with green/amber/red flags (litigation RPT auditor contingent liabilities ESG)
Key_Data_Points: Each row: icon + brief text, use .fig/.fia/.fir classes for colors

Description: 7 items with red/amber/green severity icons and one-line descriptions
Key_Data_Points: Icons left, title bold, detail in smaller text

Description: 5-6 upcoming events with dates (FY26 Sep 2026 FY27 etc)
Key_Data_Points: Specific dates, one-line event description, green .cd labels

Description: Bullet list (regulatory approvals BIRAC recognition IDMA etc)
Key_Data_Points: Names and brief context only

Description: Timeline 7-8 items (date event)
Key_Data_Points: Most recent first (Jun 2026 at top), going back to founding year

Description: 6-7 quantified targets with timelines
Key_Data_Points: Target metrics (e.g. revenue ₹300 Cr by FY26), specific not vague

Description: Table with 5-6 comparable companies (name revenue margin focus)
Key_Data_Points: Embio/target company in bottom row highlighted green, 3-4 columns max

Description: Simple list (India HQ N.America Europe Asia RoW with %)
Key_Data_Points: Locations, revenue % by region, key regulatory approvals by market

Description: Gray note section listing sections NOT relevant for this company type
Key_Data_Points: e.g. 'Unlisted: FII/DII, Shareholding trend, Valuation multiples'
